title: 10 Herbal Teas For Fibrocystic Breast Disease
description: Curcuma longa teas contains bioactive compounds like curcumin, demethoxycurcumin, and bisdemethoxycurcumin. These compounds have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties that can help reduce pain and discomfort associated with fibrocystic breast disease. Curcumin, in particular, has been shown to inhibit the production of prostaglandins, which are hormone-like substances that can cause breast tenderness and pain.
